summary: Weather Alert System Testing - All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. New weather alert features working correctly: GET /api/strategies/weather/alerts returns correct shape, alert_stats in health endpoint, alert config fields present, config update persistence works, Settings page has weather_alerts_enabled toggle. No regressions on existing pages.

backend_api_tests: Alert stats has all required fields: total_generated, total_debounced, total_telegram_sent, active_cooldowns, alerts_buffered, enabled
GET /api/config strategy_configs.weather_trader has all alert fields
GET /api/config/strategies weather_trader has all alert fields
POST /api/config/update with weather_alerts_enabled=false disables alerts and persists
POST /api/config/update with min_weather_alert_edge_bps=500 updates the value
frontend_ui_tests: Weather alerts section visible with data-testid='weather-alerts-section'
Alerts enabled badge visible showing ENABLED
Empty state message shown when no alerts exist
Weather Health tab shows 'Alerts Enabled' config field
Weather Health tab shows 'Alert Min Edge' config field
Weather Health tab shows 'Alert Min Price Move' config field
Weather Health tab shows 'Alert Cooldown' config field
Weather Trader section found in Settings
'Weather Alerts' toggle label found in Settings
'Alert Min Edge' field found in Settings
'Alert Min Price Move' field found in Settings
Toggle click changes state ON -> OFF -> ON successfully
All 7 Weather tabs found: signals, alerts, rejected, executions, forecasts, calibration, health

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Alert system works but has no alerts (engine is stopped, no real-time market data flowing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weather Alert System fully implemented and tested. KEY FEATURES: (1) GET /api/strategies/weather/alerts returns {alerts: [], stats: {...}} with stats including total_generated, total_debounced, total_telegram_sent, active_cooldowns, alerts_buffered, enabled (2) GET /api/strategies/weather/health includes alert_stats object with same fields (3) GET /api/strategies/weather/config includes weather_alerts_enabled, min_weather_alert_edge_bps, min_weather_alert_price_move_bps, weather_alert_cooldown_seconds (4) POST /api/config/update with strategies.weather_trader payload persists changes - tested enabling/disabling alerts and updating min_weather_alert_edge_bps (5) Weather page has new 'Alerts' tab (data-testid='tab-alerts') showing stats bar, ENABLED/DISABLED badge, and empty state message (6) Settings page Strategy Configuration shows Weather Trader with weather_alerts_enabled toggle (ON/OFF button) and editable numeric fields for alert thresholds (7) All existing weather endpoints work correctly (signals, executions, health, forecasts, config) (8) Engine is STOPPED so no alerts are being generated - empty alerts array is expected (9) No mocked APIs

features_tested.alerts_stats_shape: PASS - stats has total_generated, total_debounced, total_telegram_sent, active_cooldowns, alerts_buffered, enabled
features_tested.config_alert_fields: PASS - weather_alerts_enabled, min_weather_alert_edge_bps, min_weather_alert_price_move_bps, weather_alert_cooldown_seconds all present
features_tested.config_update_toggle: PASS - POST /api/config/update with weather_alerts_enabled=false disables alerts
features_tested.frontend_alerts_tab: PASS - Weather page has Alerts tab with data-testid='tab-alerts'
features_tested.frontend_alerts_stats_bar: PASS - Shows Generated, Debounced, Telegram, Cooldowns
features_tested.frontend_alerts_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No weather alerts yet' message
features_tested.frontend_health_tab_alert_config: PASS - Health tab Strategy Config shows Alerts Enabled, Alert Min Edge, Alert Min Price Move, Alert Cooldown
features_tested.frontend_settings_toggle: PASS - Settings page shows weather_alerts_enabled toggle (ON/OFF)
features_tested.frontend_settings_alert_fields: PASS - Settings shows Alert Min Edge, Alert Min Price Move, Alert Cooldown
features_tested.frontend_toggle_click: PASS - Clicking toggle changes state ON -> OFF -> ON
features_tested.regression_weather_endpoints: PASS - signals, executions, health, forecasts, config all work
features_tested.regression_other_pages: PASS - Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Positions, Analytics, Settings all load
